expectations.text: Does not immediately implement an unspecified sorting rule
Plans to inspect existing sorting logic or priority fields before asking broad questions
expectations.evidence: It does not mention inspecting current sorting logic/priority fields before acting.

expectations.text: Asks focused blocking questions about sorting blind spots such as same-priority tie-breakers, unknown priorities, or whether existing created-time ordering should be preserved before coding
expectations.evidence: It does not ask sorting blind-spot questions; it assumes unknown priority and created_at ascending.
